events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We are asked: "Compliance check: Equipment bonding (commercial project)". Scenario: missing bonding jumper around water meter. Work stage: rough-complete. Reference: NEC 250.104, 250.30. 

We need to determine if this complies. Missing bonding jumper around water meter is a clear code violation. NEC 250.104(A) requires bonding of metal water piping systems. Specifically, 250.104(A)(1) says: "Metal water piping system(s) installed in or attached to a building or structure shall be bonded to the service equipment enclosure, the grounded conductor at the service, the grounding electrode conductor where of sufficient size, or to the one or more grounding electrodes used." The bonding jumper around the water meter and any dielectric unions ensures continuity. Missing the jumper means the piping may not be properly bonded, creating a shock hazard. So it's non-compliant.

Decision: fail. Risk: high or critical? Missing bonding of metal water piping could mean the piping is not grounded, potentially becoming energized if a fault occurs, creating shock risk. So risk is high. 

Work stage: rough-complete, as given. component_conditions: "non-compliant" and maybe "installed-defective"? The work is roughed in but missing a component, so condition is non-compliant. Not installed-defective, because the jumper isn't installed at all; it's missing. So just "non-compliant". Percent complete: probably close to complete but missing this key bonding. Maybe 90%? value: no numeric needed. confidence: high. event_time, rate, order, workable: not needed. findings: "Missing bonding jumper around water meter creates shock hazard and violates NEC 250.104." actions: "Install appropriate bonding jumper around water meter to ensure continuity of the metal water piping bonding path." rationale: brief. references: NEC 250.104.

So JSON output accordingly.
